2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch adds a per-CPU cache to store the most recently used vswap cluster during vswap operations, allowing consecutive lookups on the same cluster to skip traversing the global xarray. This improves performance for swap-heavy workloads by reducing the cost of xa_load operations. The cache is cleared when a lookup targets a different cluster, the cached cluster becomes empty, or the CPU goes offline. A reference is held on the cached cluster to keep it alive.
